violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Outside freezer had open boxes stored on floor.

Hot storage of potentially hazardous food. — --Hot food storage facilities/equipment was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining temperature of potentially hazardous food at 140F or greater. Chicken strips, sandwiches in hot hold unable to maintain 140 degrees or higher.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Observed open containers of Mrs Gerry's not marked with date. Sandwich meat and cheese in zip bags not date marked.

Time as a public health control. — --Food was not marked or identified with the time within which it must be cooked, served, or discarded. Observed food in hot hold not marked with time made or discard time.--Written procedures were not maintained or made available to the regulatory authority. Manager states no written policy.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Manager states ice cream machine cleaned monthly. Ice cream machine needs to be cleaned more frequent.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Observed dust and debris on ventilation hood. Needs to be cleaned more frequent.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
